My capabilities include:
 - Color group locations
 - College group loactions
 - OL intel 
 - Breakout session info 
 - Schedule event times/locations
How may I help?
The facilities number is: 740-593-2911
If the doors for your building are locked, I would suggest either informing your GA or calling facilities: 740-593-2911
To notify the golf cart, call the BSO office: 740-593-1951
Of course! Let me know if I can be of further assistance!
BSO Email: orientation@ohio.edu

Paying for College is on Day 2 from 1:10 to 1:50 in Memorial Auditorium
BSO Welcome and Program Overview is on Day 1 from 1:00 to 1:50 in Memorial Auditorium
Belonging takes place Day 1 from 1:50 to 3:35
Yes, Parker dyes his hair red

SHUTTLE SCHEDULES:

Day 1: 8:30 a.m. - 12:45 p.m.
Convo -> Jeff -> Baker

Day 2: 6:15 a.m. - 8:30 a.m.
Jeff -> Convo -> Baker -> Nelson

Each loop takes ~20 minutes

Breakout session 1 takes place Day 1 from 3:50 to 4:30
Breakout session 2 takes place Day 1 from 4:40 to 5:20

The Living on Campus breakout session takes place both times in Morton 201
This session covers details and tips regarding move-in, dining venues, and technology resources as you prepare for life on campus at OU

The Getting Involved breakout session takes place both times in Morton 235
This session helps find your community, develop your leadership skills, and create lasting memories. With 400+ organizations, student governement, and sorority/fraternity life, there is something for everyone

keywords: where is beyond books and tutoring
what is beyond books and tutoring
entries.answer:
The Beyond Books & Tutoring breakout session takes place both times in Morton 115
This session covers campus resources that support academic success, including tutoring, help services, study spaces, and acclimating to campus

The Holistic Support breakout session takes place both times in Morton 237
This session will introduce a variety of support services, including student accomodations, peer connected programming, well-being coaching, and student health services

keywords: what is commuter student experienceholistic support
entries.answer:
The Commuter Student Experience breakout session takes place during session 1 in Morton 127
This session explores commuter-specific resources, as well as commuter programming, outreach events, and student employement opportunities on campus

keywords: where is ohio honors program breakout
what is ohio honors program breakout
entries.answer:
The OHIO Honors Program breakout session takes place during session 2 in Morton 127
This session covers program requirements and opportunities for the OHIO Honors Program, an experience-based program that supports students through interdisciplinary coursework and out-of-class activities.

BREAKOUT SESSIONS:
Living on Campus (3:50-4:30, 4:40-5:20): Morton 201
Getting Involved (3:50-4:30, 4:40-5:20): Morton 235
Beyond Books & Tutoring (3:50-4:30, 4:40-5:20): Morton 115
Holistic Support (3:50-4:30, 4:40-5:20): Morton 237
Commuter Student Experience (3:50-4:30): Morton 127
OHIO Honors Program (4:40-5:20): Morton 127
Placement testing is available in Morton 122 during breakout sessions
Dinner takes place on Day 1 at Nelson, 5:20 - 6:30
Rufus Rumble takes place on Day 1 at Morton, 7:25 - 8:30
Academic Essentials takes place on Day 2 from 9:35 to 11:05
Succeeding takes place on Day 2 from 8:25 to 9:25
Owning takes place on Day 2 from 11:05 to 11:45

OWNING LOCATIONS:

Advising takes place on Day 2 starting at 1:50
Thriving takes place on Day 1 in Morton 201, from 6:40 to 7:15
BSO Blast takes place on Day 1, from 8:30 to 10:00

keywords: how do I get on slate
entries.answer:
The link to Slate is: https://enroll.ohio.edu/manage/ 
 - Click 'Events' tab at the top
 - Select BSO event for today
 - Click 'Launch Chheck-In'

FAMILY AND GUEST SCHEDULE:
 DAY 1:
 - BSO Welcome: 1:00-1:50 at Memorial Auditorium
 - Helping your Student Thrive: 2:05-2:30 at Memorial Auditorium
 - Campus Safety and Support Panel: 2:30-3:05 at Memorial Auditorium
 - Understanding FERPA: 3:15-3:30 at Memorial Auditorium
 - Breakout Sessions: 3:50-5:20 at Morton Hall
 - Dinner: 5:20-6:30 at Nelson
 - Dessert Reception: 6:30-7:30 at 29 Park Place
 - Family Programming: 8:00 at Lincoln Hall

 DAY 2:
 - Move-Out: 6:30-8:00
 - Breakfast: 7:00-8:15 at Nelson
 - Academic College Sessions: 8:30-9:20 at various locations
 - What Does OHIO Have to Offer: 9:40-10:20 at Memorial Auditorium
 - WIWMFK: 10:20-10:50 at Memorial Auditorium
 - Family to Family: 10:55-11:40 at Memorial Auditorium
 - Lunch: 11:40-12:55 at Nelson
 - Paying For College: 1:10-1:50 at Memorial Auditorium
 - Next Steps Panel: 2:00-2:30 at Memorial Auditorium
 - Beyond BSO: 2:30-3:00 at Memorial Auditorium

DAY 1:
 - Polo's until dinner (unless on Thriving)
 - Striped shirt after

DAY 2: - Other shirt
